alkylation reagent: alkylation with the addition of 16 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation with the addition of 16 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: Trypsin was added at a 1:20 protein-to-enzyme mass ratio
collision energy: fragmentation by HCD using a quadrupole isolation width of 1.5 Th and NCE = 32%
instrument: using an Eksigent nanoLC-ultra-2D pump coupled to a TripleTOF 5600
ionization type: spray voltage was set to 2.0 kV
reduction reagent: denatured by the addition of 6 mM DTT
reduction concentration: denatured by the addition of 6 mM DTT
